items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #5' aims to confirm the behavior of 'Notification delivery failure handling'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to the requirements of the linked use case, particularly regarding the delivery event timeline and retry visibility. This lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
